TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Maybalay, title = Maybalay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maybalay} }

S.FORM: alang Maybalay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 35 buwan, 70 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 57 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 74%, saySiyat 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maybalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Maybalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Maybalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maybalay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Maybalay hya' ga Yohae'. tay mkraya' na Maybalay hya' ga Tatoba'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Maybalay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 35 buwan, 70 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 57 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 74%, saySiyat 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maybalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Maybalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Maybalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maybalay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Maybalay hya' ga Yohae'. tay mkraya' na Maybalay hya' ga Tatoba'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ majβalaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na majβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na majβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na majβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na majβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na majβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa joħaeʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na majβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa tatoβaʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
